elements.text: For the first time since being diagnosed with PD, you find yourself confused by a familiar cake recipe. You ask your spouse a question about the recipe, and they go quiet. When you look into your spouse's eyes, their emotions are...

elements.name: Difficulty Baking_Early/Mid-Stage Symptoms_puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
